assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md contains tables for both streams showing all 7 versions (2.1.0, 2.1.1, 2.2.0, 2.2.1, 2.2.2, 2.2.3, 2.2.4) with 'NO' in the Affected? column. Each version lists its serde_json version (1.0.137-1.0.139), all above the fix threshold of 1.0.135. Combined Impact Summary concludes: 'NO supported versions are affected. Every supported version across both streams ships serde_json >= 1.0.135, which is at or above the fix threshold.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 8 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states 'Decision: Case C -- No Supported Versions Affected' and 'Proposed action: Close as "Not a Bug" (not affected).' Section 5 proposes: 'Transition TC-8002 to Closed with resolution Not a Bug.' Remediation Tasks section states: 'None required. No supported versions are affected by CVE-2026-28940, so no remediation tasks are created.'

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '3. Post triage summary comment' contains a proposed Jira comment with a full table listing all 7 versions and their serde_json versions: 2.1.0/1.0.137, 2.1.1/1.0.137, 2.2.0/1.0.138, 2.2.1/1.0.138, 2.2.2/1.0.138, 2.2.3/1.0.139, 2.2.4/1.0.139. Comment concludes: 'All supported versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.137, which is outside the affected range (< 1.0.135). The vulnerable version was never present in any shipped product release.'

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 8 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md VEX Justification section states 'Proposed value: Component not Present' with rationale: 'The vulnerable package version (serde_json < 1.0.135) is not included in any supported product version.' Section 4 proposes: 'Set customfield_12345 (VEX Justification) to "Component not Present".'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 8 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md Remediation Tasks section: 'None required. No supported versions are affected by CVE-2026-28940, so no remediation tasks are created. There is no upstream backport task, no downstream propagation task, and no Konflux release repo fix needed.' Cross-Stream Impact section: 'No cross-stream impact... No cross-stream notices or proactive remediation tasks are needed.' version-impact.md Upstream Fix Status: 'Not applicable... No upstream backport or remediation is needed.'
